evidence: Exact host-readable routing from the real-weight profiler inputs, generated by test_profile_ep_activity_accounting with seed 61000+layer_idx
tt_perf_report_policy: Decode uses the measured critical-rank maximum because it has one token. Prefill omits sparse DRAM/FLOP modeling because the tool accepts only one integer active-experts value and cannot represent varying per-token EP activity.
runtime_decision: Keep sparse_matmul nnz unset so runtime derives active rows from the gate-selected expert mask.
